---
description: Load when editing or reviewing skill definitions in this SDLC starter so skills stay discovery-friendly and operational.
applyTo: '(^|.*/)\.github/skills/.*/SKILL\.md$'
---

Skills in this starter should:

- include concrete trigger phrases in the description
- teach repeatable workflows, not generic philosophy
- define expected outputs and evidence shape
- reference deterministic scripts when a check can be automated
- stay aligned with the KB-first SDLC rather than duplicating feature state
- produce concrete artifacts, checklists, plans, or evidence rather than only narrative summaries

Preferred skill themes:

- knowledge-base
- impact-assessment
- design
- coding
- unit-test
- sit-test
- production-readiness
- data-api-analytics
- legacy-code-scanner
- kb-bootstrapper
- code-verifier
- modernization-roadmap
